note: The browser app never reads OPENAI_API_KEY. This public file intentionally omits key presence, provider success, model name, HTTP status, and raw provider errors.
safety: Use public/cached/synthetic data only; no target designation or strike automation.
briefingBullets:
- Demo uses only public, cached, and synthetic data; no live or classified sources.  
- All sourced information includes citations; users must verify before operational use.  
- Outputs are for analyst support and require thorough human review and validation.  
- This tool does not support targeting decisions or automate strike recommendations.
